name: @shunter/client
description: Private local Shunter v1 TypeScript client runtime.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && tsc -p tsconfig.runtime-test.json && node test/runtime-behavior.test.mjs && node .tmp_runtime_test/test/generated-type-index-decoding.test.js && node test/hosted-type-index-canary.test.mjs
